creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: koobs
Date: Fri Jan  8 04:48:19 UTC 2016
New revision: 405521
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/405521

Log:
  [NEW] devel/py-frozendict: Immutable dictionary implementation for Python

  frozendict is an immutable wrapper around dictionaries that implements the
  complete mapping interface. It can be used as a drop-in replacement for
  dictionaries where immutability is desired.

  WWW: https://github.com/slezica/python-frozendict

  PR:		205914
  Submitted by:	Brendan Molloy <brendan+freebsd@bbqsrc.net>

Changes:
  head/devel/Makefile
  head/devel/py-frozendict/
  head/devel/py-frozendict/Makefile
  head/devel/py-frozendict/distinfo
  head/devel/py-frozendict/pkg-descr
